name: WW Chinese-Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Skinned and boned Chicken, cut into 3 x 1/2 inch strips
1 tsp Minced fresh ginger (or 1/4 tsp Ground ginger)
8 oz Fresh or frozen snow peas (or sliced drained canned water chestnuts, optional)
1 tbsp Cornstarch blended with 1 tsp Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in a preheated nonstick skillet.
2. Add celery, mushrooms, water, ginger and broth mix to the skillet.
3. Cover and bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the chicken is tender (about 20 minutes).
4. Stir in snow peas.
5. Add soy sauce and blended cornstarch; cook and stir until thickened.
